title: Onboarding -  Permission for location tracking accepted [Android]
scenario: Location tracking permission re-prompted when accessing FindMyDevice menu after accepting during onboarding on Android
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. Accept the License Agreement and Privacy Policy.
5. In the system pop-up, select 'Allow' to grant location tracking permission.
expected: Location tracking is enabled for the app. The user proceeds to further onboarding steps. The app should not ask for permissions again when accessing the FindMyDevice menu.
